comment.body:
You nailed it with your take Han. Also China is a price setter and not a price taker. This is a clear geopolitical war masked as tariffs. Admin and his backers know that if China is not contained right now, with access to AI and ample rare earth minerals it can overtake the current world power. Stock market can be blown up or sacrificed in this long term game. Of course middle east rich countries are making their own moves as Alma has written. 

Will be interesting for sure and so far Admin's game with China is not working.

I think some possible part is
- retest somewhere around 6670 for a last pump- maybe til fomc? Then decline in november: i don’t think this is the case, since this rally has been strong: we might as well see new ath if we even come close to 6670
